title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The oil's unique blend of flavonoids, saponins, and triterpenoids promotes healing and reduces inflammation in the affected area. By soothing and calming the tissues, Calendula essential oil can help reduce knee swelling and alleviate discomfort, making it a popular natural remedy for joint pain and inflammation.
